macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: U.S. Gas Prices Surge Above $4/Gallon Amid Iran War Oil Shock
items.summary: National average gas prices have climbed above $4 per gallon for the first time since 2022 due to the Iran conflict disrupting oil supplies, with diesel in San Francisco hitting $8/gallon and oil topping $100/barrel. Airlines like United and JetBlue are raising baggage fees citing surging fuel costs.[1][3]

items.title: Fed Officials Warn of Inflation Spike from Energy Prices
items.summary: Fed Chair Jerome Powell and NY Fed President John Williams highlight risks of a new energy supply shock spreading inflation across sectors, with short-term inflation expectations jumping to 5% per TIPS data. Goldman Sachs raised its inflation forecast due to the oil shock.[1][2]

items.title: March Jobs Report Shows Solid Hiring Despite Wage Miss
items.summary: The Labor Department reported strong job additions in March after February's decline, but average hourly earnings rose only 0.2%, missing expectations amid softening wage growth and rising energy costs.[1][3]

items.title: 30-Year Mortgage Rates Rise to 6.46% Highest Since September
items.summary: Freddie Mac data shows the average 30-year fixed mortgage rate increased to 6.46% from 6.38% last week, exacerbating housing affordability issues amid the ongoing Iran war's economic pressures.[1][3]

items.title: Stocks Mixed as Trump Signals Iran War Off-Ramp; Dow Up 1,000 Points Earlier
items.summary: U.S. stocks closed mixed after Trump vowed to hit Iran 'extremely hard' but urged allies to seize the Strait of Hormuz, with the Dow surging 1,000 points on hopes of de-escalation while oil prices rose over 10%.[3]

items.title: Iran War Hits Farmers with Skyrocketing Fertilizer and Diesel Costs
items.summary: Strait of Hormuz disruptions have driven urea fertilizer and diesel prices dramatically higher, forcing farmers to shift from corn to soybeans and threatening food commodity prices even post-war.[4]

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Strategy and Bitmine Jump 6% as Crypto Treasury Plays Catch Fire
items.summary: Strategy (MSTR) and Bitmine Immersion Technologies (BMNR) stocks surged 6% following a Bitcoin price rebound to nearly $70,000. Both companies hold significant crypto assets, with Strategy holding 713,502 BTC and Bitmine pursuing 5% of all Ethereum.

items.title: Bitcoin Rises 3% to $69,230 Amid US-Iran Discussions
items.summary: Bitcoin climbed 3.47% in the last 24 hours to $69,230, driven by an Axios report confirming active US-Iran discussions.

items.title: Crypto Market Capitalisation Recovers to $2.38 Trillion
items.summary: The total crypto market capitalization recovered to $2.38 trillion, rising approximately 2.5% over the past 24 hours following a $100 billion inflow.

items.title: TRU Token Surges 98.46% in 24-Hour Market Volatility
items.summary: TRU led crypto gainers with a stunning 98.46% surge to $0.0111, generating $177.78 million in trading volume.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Windward Launches Agentic Maritime Anomaly Analysis with AWS Generative AI
items.summary: Windward partnered with AWS Generative AI Innovation Center to develop MAI Expert™, the first generative AI maritime agent, which contextualizes anomalies using real-time news, intelligent web search, and Amazon Rerank for actionable risk assessments.

items.title: AIM-AHEAD Spotlights Innovative AI/ML Research in Healthcare
items.summary: AIM-AHEAD's research showcase on April 6 highlights consortium projects using AI/ML for healthcare challenges, including machine learning models that outperform traditional stats in kidney disease progression analysis.

items.title: Roche Launches Global AI Drug Discovery Factory Powered by NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs
items.summary: Roche unveiled a major computational drug development initiative with over 3,500 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs, marking a leap in AI-driven drug discovery.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Street Fighter 6 Introduces Controversial Character Ingrid, Sparking Speculation on Major Changes
items.summary: Ingrid, a space god character from the canceled Capcom Fighting All-Stars project, has returned in Street Fighter 6, generating buzz about potential system mechanic overhauls, guest characters, and collaborations like Capcom vs. SNK 3.

items.title: TES vs AL Highlights from LPL 2026 Split 2 Released
items.summary: Full highlights of all games from TES vs AL in the League of Legends Pro League 2026 Split 2 have been shared, covering top esports action in the ongoing season.

items.title: Raid: Shadow Legends Adds New Token Trader Champions Gentoro and Suzarin Katon
items.summary: New token trader champions Gentoro and Suzarin Katon have been introduced in Raid: Shadow Legends, with reviews assessing their viability and value for players.

items.title: Hearthstone Cataclysm Expansion: Best Control Priest 3.0 Deck Post-Nerfs
items.summary: A new Control Priest deck for Hearthstone's Cataclysm expansion has been highlighted as the top choice to craft after recent nerfs, featuring cards like Bitterbloom Knight and Atiesh the Greatstaff.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Kobe University Develops Inkjet-Printable Structural Color Technology
items.summary: Researchers at Kobe University have created a revolutionary inkjet printing method for structural color using nanomaterials, which does not fade like traditional pigments. This breakthrough enables durable, vibrant color production for various applications.

items.title: New Wireless Technology Promises Faster, Greener Indoor Connections
items.summary: A novel method delivers faster and more energy-efficient wireless connections indoors, addressing demands from video calls, streaming, VR, and smart devices serving billions of users. The technology aims to enhance network performance without increasing power consumption.

items.title: Breakthrough Platinum Catalyst Advances High-Efficiency Hydrogen Fuel Cells
items.summary: Scientists have developed a new platinum catalyst that overcomes key barriers in fuel cell technology, bringing high-efficiency hydrogen vehicles closer to commercial viability. This innovation improves performance and reduces costs for clean energy transport.

items.title: DNA-Based Ultra-Low Power Memory Achieves Electronics Breakthrough
items.summary: Scientists have merged DNA with electronics to create an ultra-low power memory device, opening new possibilities for energy-efficient data storage in future computing systems.

items.title: Quantum Effect Enables Battery-Free Electronics
items.summary: Researchers discovered a quantum phenomenon in advanced materials that could power future electronics without batteries, leveraging electric fields for sustainable device operation.

items.title: Dual-Mode Solar Panel Generates Power from Sunlight and Raindrops
items.summary: A new thin-film solar panel technology produces electricity from both sunlight and raindrops, enhancing energy generation in varied weather conditions.
